notableEvents.label: Jo Adell GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jo Adell grounds into a double play, third baseman Ryan McMahon to second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. to first baseman Ben Rice. Nolan Schanuel out at 2nd. Jo Adell out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Umpire reviewed (tag play), call on the field was upheld: José Caballero doubles (4) on a line drive to center fielder Mike Trout. Jazz Chisholm Jr. scores. Austin Wells scores.

notableEvents.label: José Caballero GIDP
notableEvents.detail: José Caballero grounds into a double play, second baseman Adam Frazier to shortstop Zach Neto to first baseman Nolan Schanuel. Austin Wells out at 2nd. José Caballero out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Paul Goldschmidt pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Paul Goldschmidt lines out to second baseman Adam Frazier.
